NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-07-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHLL PAY PLAINTIFF $5,250 IN 3 INSTALLMENTS: $1,750 BY DECEMBER 8, 2013, $1,750 BY JANUARY 8, 2014 AND $1,750 BY FEBRUARY 8, 2014, PURSUANT TO STIPULATED SETTLEMENT OF THE PARTIES", PER PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CARL HAGEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-07-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SHOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAGEN, VINCENT $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,355.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CARL HAGEN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
